name: Metronome
description: Monitor Metronome usage-based billing platform for access and revenue data compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Metronome at https://metronome.com
2. Go to Settings → API Keys
3. Create a new API key
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Metronome Settings → API Keys
